projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2 — Xcode Cloud build SPM error fixed: the CI script now disables Swift Package Manager so the build resolves via CocoaPods. Pushed (79b6813).
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build — it should get past the post-clone step now.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.6.1 hardened paper detection + added a guard against garbage numbers. Honest finding: foot-on-paper can't be made reliable (small sheet covered by the foot, bright floor). The real fix is a capture change.
projects.nextStep: Decide: switch to placing the paper BESIDE the foot (both flat on the floor) — always a clean, fully-visible rectangle. Claude can make that code change.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Launch-polish done: demo screen replaced, toggle moved into a real Settings screen, matching reframed into Romantic/Friends/Networking tabs with tagged matches. UX review: the experience is built; real go-live still needs auth, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.
projects.nextStep: Decide whether Claude takes on the go-live backend next: authentication, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed; Mirror exercise now has a close button on every step. Code-complete at v1.3.0.
projects.nextStep: Confirm build 22 reached TestFlight and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive is running green — the project won't auto-pause anymore.
projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: Homepage Progress section (rainbow SRS bars) shipped; 'Burned' SRS state renamed to 'Perfected' across the UI — committed.

projects.name: PAPPY
projects.note: v2.5.10 (billing null-guard + crash fix) deployed to Firebase and live for users.

projects.name: irons-holistic
projects.note: Static recreation of irons.be deployed and live.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app — backend foundation built & pushed. A new spec for a separate app is meant to be built too, but it isn't in the PRIMAL folder — couldn't be located.
projects.nextStep: Point Claude to the new spec (it's not in the PRIMAL folder) or paste it in chat, so the separate app can be built.
